strengths: Good Google Business Profile rating (4.7 with 52 reviews)

suggestions: Encourage more customer reviews to increase visibility

issues: Missing LocalBusiness schema details (e.g., opening hours, geo)
recommendations: Implement Service schema to detail specific HVAC services offered

improvement_opportunities: Enhance content with targeted HVAC keywords and phrases
Incorporate AI-driven content recommendations for better search visibility
Utilize AI tools to analyze and optimize meta tags and descriptions
